creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
[CCed bapt, since he committed the patch]

The issue is caused by the following patch:

http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/graphics/opencv/files/patch-modules__ts__include__opencv2__ts__ts_gtest.h?revision=326912&view=markup

__has_include doesn't work with gcc on FreeBSD 8.x

-- 
Alex Dupre
